page_content:
Repeatable to: 2 credits.

HACS402 Applied Security Analysis and Visualization (3 Credits) Focuses on exploratory and statistical data analysis, data and information visualization, and the presentation and communication of analysis results. These topics will be presented and explored in the context of and with applications to cybersecurity related data. Restriction: Must be a student in the ACES (Advanced Cybersecurity Experience for Students) Minor Program.
